usage: streamOut [-help] <fileName> [-attachNetProp <string>] [-dieAreaAsBoundary] [-extraMapFile <string>] [-ignoreSubtype {NETTYPE SHAPE}] [-libName <string>] [-mapFile <string>] [-mergeViaCellMapFile <string>] [-mode {ALL FILLONLY NOFILL NOINSTANCES}] [-noStructureName] [-offset {x y}] [-outputCriticalNetColorFromFileOnly <string>] [-outputMacros] [-probe_pin_label <string>] [-reportFile <string>] [-signoff_fill] [-structureName <string>] [-units <integer>] [-merge <string> [-noTSV <tsv_name_list>] [-uniquifyCellNames ]] [{-area {x1 y1 x2 y2} } [-strict ] [-enclosed_instances_only ]] [-format {stream oasis} [-outputInstanceName <string>] [-outputNetName <string>]] [-attachInstanceName <integer> | -outputInstanceName <string>] [-attachNetName <integer> | -outputNetName <string>]

options.name: -enclosed_instances_only
options.description: Only stream out the instances whose shapes are fully enclosed by specified area.

options.name: -ignoreSubtype
options.description: Ignore the map file line with subtype keywords

options.name: -mergeViaCellMapFile
options.description: Specify the cell list which need merge via cell from external file.

options.name: -noStructureName
options.description: merge GDSII file withOut loading design

options.name: -noTSV
options.description: A list of TSV via names that should be from merge file not be written out from design.

options.name: -outputCriticalNetColorFromFileOnly
options.description: <string> Specify the net list and layer range which need output color to gds file.

options.name: -outputInstanceName
options.description: Write the instance name string to oasis file.

options.name: -outputNetName
options.description: Write the net name string to oasis file.

options.name: -probe_pin_label
options.description: User specify probe label string, default PROBE_PIN

options.name: -signoff_fill
options.description: Merge the signoff fill data attached to the current DB into the output gds file.

options.name: -strict
options.description: Truncate the object outside the area

options.name: -uniquifyCellNames
options.description: uniquify conflict cell name in merge file
